title: Haloschoenus elatior

Within the Cyperaceae family, Haloschoenus elatior can be further classified into the subfamily Cyperoideae. This subfamily contains many species of sedges, which are typically found in wetland environments. Further classification may also include its genus, which in this case is Haloschoenus.
